recommended_next_sprint: Phase 0: root/package reconciliation and contributor command clarity.
Phase 1: governance/meta-test closure before broad feature work.
Phase 2: lint, format, and type baseline debt registry.
Phase 3: controller-authorized mapping apply only after governance is green.
Phase 4: clarify Device Explorer, Signal Explorer, and Mapping UI boundaries.
Phase 5: degraded-condition simulation and replay coverage.
Phase 6: UI validation after headless/core stability.

Generated audit_reports/testing and proof journal changes were produced by diagnostics and are intentionally not part of this first-pass artifact set.
